metaData.Key Information: Zoo Original Butter Biscuits are made in Germany with good quality. The biscuits have no added preservatives, artificial colourings and artificial flavourings. Cuter designs by integrating comic characters to attract the kids.
metaData.SAP Product Name: BAHLSEN LEIBNIZ ZOO ORIGINAL BUTTER BISCUITS 100G

metaData.Ingredients:
Wheat Flour (50%), Unrefined Cane Sugar, Spelt Flour (13%), Sunflower Oil (10%), Wholegrain Oatmeal (6.7%), Apple Extract, Oilgofructose, Raising Agents: Sodium Carbonates, Diphosphates; Skimmed Milk Powder, Salt, Emulsifier: Lecithins; Flavourings (Milk), Acid: Citric Acid
• Contains: Wheat, spelt, oatmeal and milk
• May contains: Eggs
metaData.Key Information:
• High quality
• No added preservatives
• Contains no artificial colourings and flavourings
• Cuter designs by integrating comic characters

metaData.Key Information:
• Crispy baked wafer with a tasty nutella filling
• A combination of creamy nutella and a unique baguette shaped wafer developed to create the perfect balance of taste and texture
• Perfect break-time snack
• Contains no artificial colouring
• No added preservatives

metaData.Ingredients:
Wheat Flour 30.00%, Sugar 27.00%, Shortening 20.00%, Cocoa Powder 10.00%, Palm Oil 5.40%, Milk Powder 5.40%, Iodized Salt 0.14%, Raising Agent (INS500(ii), INS503(ii), Emulsifier (INS322(i), Natural Colour (INS150C), Natural Identical Flavour Added.
Information For Food Allergen : Contains Wheat Flour, Sulphites, Milk and Soybean Product.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a dry place, away from sunlight.
